title: adapter/git (os/exec wrapper for pull/push/add/commit/mv)
acceptance_criteria: Wraps git via os/exec; surface includes Pull --rebase, Push, Add, Commit, Mv, ConflictedFiles.
Returns structured errors (e.g. ErrConflict) so usecase can branch.
Tests run against a t.TempDir() git repo (real git binary required).
